channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): John Healey resigns as defence secretary in disagreement with Starmer over spending – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: The saga over this plan and this sorry conclusion is going to be *the* case study of why Starmer failed as PM.
item.description: The saga over this plan and this sorry conclusion is going to be *the* case study of why Starmer failed as PM.

item.title: Reuters: British defence minister Healey quits over defence spending - Reuters
